ids.notes: JP cut-in is deliberate silence (6×…); mirrored exactly, even ellipsis count. name shared with idn 30 (not owned here): repeated current value, 4 cells within 5-cell/64px box.

notes: コアDG細胞 (Devil Gundam core DG cells) is a mute voice-set: every JP bark and the cut-in are pure ellipses (6×…) with 0-2 trailing ！. The only faithful and budget-legal translation is a 1:1 mirror of the JP silence — no invented speech (budgets 6-8 bytes forbid it anyway; a single CJK pair would displace ellipses and break the silent characterization). Consistent with sibling set char_457 (DG细胞), whose staging shows the identical all-ellipsis pattern. detail (idn 1374) owned by char_43 — omitted. Ellipsis counts are even (6) per charset rule; every record exactly meets its byte budget. No web sources needed: no verbal content to verify; fixed name 核心DG细胞 matches community usage for DG细胞/コア (no flag).
